summary: Testing completed for Store Pickup flow and Product API refactoring. All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend verified: products load from API, filters work, Add to Cart works, Store Pickup shows 'Fast-Track Pickup' branding with 3 time slots (4:30pm-7:30pm excluded), and ₹11 token option is hidden.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented. Frontend gracefully falls back to manual selection mode.

Products API - /api/products.details: Returns 4 products (Kesar Chandan, Regal Rose, Oriental Oudh, Bold Bakhoor) with correct structure

Products have required fields.details: All products have id, name, sizes array with prices, image

Store Pickup - States/Districts API.details: Returns Delhi, Karnataka, Maharashtra with districts

Store Pickup - Fast-Track Pickup brandin.details: 'Fast-Track Pickup' label shown in Self-Pickup payment option

Store Pickup - Time slots.details: 3 slots shown: 11:30 AM - 2:00 PM, 2:00 PM - 4:30 PM, After 8:00 PM

Store Pickup - 4:30pm-7:30pm excluded.details: Peak hour slot NOT present in options

Product filter functionality.details: Mood filters (Meditative, Relaxing, Energizing, Romantic) visible and functional

Add to Cart with API-loaded products.details: Add to Cart button works, shows 'Added!' feedback

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ productService.js correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env
✓ FragranceGrid.jsx properly handles loading/error states for API fetch
✓ TOKEN_AMOUNT=0 and TOKEN_PAYMENT_ENABLED=false correctly disable token option
✓ PICKUP_TIME_SLOTS has exactly 3 slots (peak hours excluded)
✓ PickupStoreSelector.jsx uses districts_by_state fallback for API response
Note: /api/retailers/recommend endpoint not implemented - consider adding for automatic store recommendation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Store Pickup flow fully tested. Products now load from /api/products endpoint (not mocked). TOKEN_AMOUNT=0 disables ₹11 token payment. Time slots are 11:30am-2pm, 2pm-4:30pm, After 8pm (peak 4:30-7:30pm excluded). Manual store selection uses /api/retailers/states-districts and /api/retailers/by-location endpoints. The /api/retailers/recommend endpoint returns 404 (not implemented) but frontend handles gracefully with fallback to manual mode.
